markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Knowledge sharing session between Town.com and GrowthX.ai on AI-assisted content generation systems and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses deterministic workflows over freestyle agents for predictability, with Temporal for orchestration](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Focus on runtime performance and error handling over developer-friendly APIs](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Evaluation and quality control are critical challenges, currently relying on human review](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Recent LLM improvements allow for more agentic approaches and less focus on RAG, but require robust evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Technical Approach

  - [Uses Temporal for workflow orchestration and state management](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Moved away from RAG to passing full context (up to 5000 words) to newer, more capable models](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Focuses on deterministic workflows over freestyle agents for predictability](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [Uses TypeScript codebase with native SDKs for various AI services (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Implements parallel processing for efficiency (e.g., splitting article sections)](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)

### Workflow Management and UI

  - [Custom-built interface for managing and monitoring workflows](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=2250.0)
  - [Engineers use a more technical interface (based on Temporal) for debugging](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)
  - [Content team uses a simplified pipeline view with human-in-the-loop checkpoints](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=2817.0)
  - [Workflow code is generated by an AI agent and then refined by engineers](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=2697.0)

### Evaluation and Quality Control

  - [Currently relies heavily on human review](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Developing an LLM-as-judge system for automated evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Challenges in implementing ML-style evaluations due to engineering team's background](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Aiming to integrate evaluations into CI/CD pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)

### Cost and Latency Considerations

  - [Less concerned about per-call costs due to B2B model](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Can tolerate higher latency (minutes vs. seconds) compared to consumer-facing chatbots](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)

### Lessons Learned and Future Directions

  - [Newer models allow for more agentic approaches from the start](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=3267.0)
  - [Less focus needed on RAG with improved model capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=3272.0)
  - [Critical to implement robust evaluation systems early](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=3288.0)
  - [Consider using ML specialists for evaluation system design](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=3349.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Town to consider GrowthX's learnings in their AI tax preparation system development](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=3563.0)
  - [Potential future knowledge sharing on Town's approach to high-stakes content generation](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=3563.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue developing their evaluation and quality control systems](https://fathom.video/share/raeyMC9VXxkLF3a3aKYKYQU_dj_Fyaxp?tab=summary&timestamp=3578.0)
